snapshot_ref.source: portfolio_snapshots row 26 — the latest snapshot as of 12:00 tick

session_context.delta_vs_11_30_tick: Essentially STABLE. Total value ₹996,562 → ₹996,514 (-₹48 drift in 30 min, ~0.005%). Deployment unchanged at 67.44%. Cash unchanged at ₹324,460 (no activity). Two intraday offsetting moves under the surface: (i) MAHABANK marginally IMPROVED -6.64% → -6.44% (+20 bps recovery, back inside the 11:00 fire-line area), (ii) HINDUNILVR extended DOWN -1.33% (10:43) → -2.66% (11:42) — a quiet 133 bps widening over the hour, now the second-largest MTM drag.

MAHABANK.note: Improved from -6.64% → -6.44% (+20 bps). Still past the 11:00 -6% fire line but trajectory flattened/reversed this tick. SL ₹75.00 intact; LTP ₹76.25 is 1.64% to stop.

PNBHOUSING.note: Continued to strengthen (+2.69% @ 10:43 → +4.01% @ 11:42, +132 bps). Largest absolute gainer on the book.

AUBANK.note: Further cooled +0.65% → +0.08%; triangle gain-leg still FALSE. Grandfathered oversize ~3.54 pp above 0.15 cap.

HINDUNILVR.note: NEW WATCH ITEM. Widened -1.33% (10:43) → -2.66% (11:42), +133 bps in ~1h. Now second-largest MTM drag behind MAHABANK. Not near any configured trigger yet but trajectory is directional.

NTPC.note: Single-name Power survivor after TORNTPOWER/ADANIPOWER exits. Essentially flat vs 11:30.

trigger_a_book_below_neg_1_pct.note: Book at -0.35%, ~65 bps inside trigger band. Drift rate has slowed materially from the 11:00 → 11:30 window (~₹2,700 / 30 min) to ~₹95 / 30 min. Trajectory decelerating.

trigger_d_bfsi_above_0_37.note: Compositional creep only; no BFSI admission. AUBANK mark softened while PNBHOUSING firmed — net BFSI value +₹40. No firing trigger.

trigger_e_mahabank_below_neg_6_pct.note: Already fired at 11:00 (min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01). Current mark -6.44% is a 20-bps recovery from the -6.64% seen at 11:13. Does NOT re-fire; the lever is in place.

trigger_e_extreme_mahabank_below_neg_8_p.note: Buffer widened by 20 bps vs 11:30 (from -6.64% → -6.44%). Not near HIGH elevation.

trigger_f_strategy_silence_past_2h.note: Silence clock at 1h16m post the 10:43:24 ADANIPOWER SELL. Approaching the 2h threshold but not tripped. If no activity by 12:43, this leg of the composite HIGH meta-trigger flips ON.

trigger_meta_high_composite.note: 1-of-3. Strategy-silence leg will flip to TRUE at 12:43 if no action; book-negative leg remains 15 bps inside its threshold. MAHABANK leg continues firing but its intensity eased +20 bps.

trigger_aubank_triangle.note: Triangle 1-of-3. Gain leg cooled further to +0.08%; unacted leg FALSE (strategy active today); oversize leg persists (grandfathered drift 18.54%, -0.09 pp vs 11:30).

trigger_hindunilvr_watch.note: NEW this tick. No pre-specified trigger on HINDUNILVR individually, but flagging the 133-bp widening over the last hour. Would join a composite if book broke below -0.5% and this continued to extend.

findings: Book essentially STABLE vs 11:30 tick: total value ₹996,562 → ₹996,514 (-₹48, -0.005%). Deployment flat at 67.44% (2.56 pp under the 0.70 override cap). Cash unchanged at ₹324,460 — admission surface remains open.

MAHABANK marginally RECOVERED +20 bps: -6.64% (11:13) → -6.44% (11:42). Still 44 bps past the 11:00 min_sl_pct fire line but the trajectory slope is the first positive tick since Day-3 market open. The 156-bps buffer to the -8% HIGH-elevation extreme widened modestly.

HINDUNILVR is the NEW watch item. Widened -1.33% (10:43) → -2.66% (11:42), +133 bps in ~1h. Now the second-largest single-name drag at -₹1,260 MTM on a 4.63%-of-capital position. Position-size small enough that no configured trigger fires, but trajectory is directional. Will escalate if the -4% threshold is tested OR if a HINDUNILVR+MAHABANK double-drag coincides with book below -0.5%.

PNBHOUSING COUNTER-BALANCE strengthened further: +2.69% → +4.01%, +132 bps over the hour. This single position is absorbing most of the MAHABANK + HINDUNILVR drag today. Largest absolute gainer on the book at +₹3,160 MTM.

BFSI cluster flat-ish at 35.94% of capital (vs 35.88% at 11:30, +0.06 pp compositional creep as PNBHOUSING firmed). Buffer to the 37% d-trigger at 1.06 pp. No BFSI admission — the admission-surface opening has been unused, a clean signal the strategy layer is not yet re-stacking the cluster post-SELL.

Daily P&L -₹3,488.75 (-0.35% of portfolio). Buffer to -1% findings trigger ₹6,479 (narrowed just ₹93 vs 11:30 — the drift rate decelerated from ~₹2,700/30min at 11:00 to ~₹95/30min this window). Loss-gate buffer ~₹26,420. The negative slope of the 10:30–11:30 window has flattened.

Strategy silence clock at 1h 16m since ADANIPOWER SELL (10:43:24). Approaching but 43m inside the 2h strategy-silence threshold. Composite HIGH meta-trigger remains 1-of-3 (MAHABANK leg only). If no action by 12:43:24, silence leg flips TRUE and meta becomes 2-of-3 — but the book-negative leg is still 15 bps inside its -0.5% threshold, so the composite HIGH would still not fire on 2-of-3 alone.

AUBANK triangle dispersed further: gain leg cooled +0.65% → +0.08% (now essentially flat), unacted leg still FALSE (strategy is active today), oversize leg still TRUE at 18.54% (grandfathered drift, now narrowed -0.09 pp). 1-of-3 legs — lowest triangle intensity since Day-1.
No new trades since 10:43:24; no OPEN orders; pending-order book continues empty. Structurally, the book is in a quiet-hold state: no new admission, no new exit, no OPEN gating to monitor.
hold_rationale: No numeric overrides changed this tick. (1) No spec-hard trigger fired: book at -0.35% (inside -1%), MAHABANK at -6.44% (improved 20 bps — past the 11:00 fire line but that lever is already in place, nowhere near the -8% HIGH-elevation threshold), BFSI at 35.94% (inside 37%), strategy silence 1h 16m (inside 2h), deployment 67.44% (under cap). (2) min_sl_pct was just fired 60 min ago (11:00, 0.005 → 0.01) on MAHABANK's -6.42% breach — stacking a second SL-floor lever on a partial recovery would be counter-signal. (3) The admission surface opened via the two SELLs has been UNUSED for 1h 16m — tightening now to re-close it without a firing trigger would friction the very SELL-first discipline the system is trying to reinforce. (4) HINDUNILVR's 133-bp widening is the most notable new datapoint, but at 4.63% of capital and -2.66% MTM, per-name risk is ~0.12% of portfolio — well inside tolerance, and HINDUNILVR is not on any pre-specified trigger list. (5) BFSI compositional creep of +0.06 pp is noise, not a signal. (6) Book drift-rate decelerated materially (from ~₹2,700/30min at 11:00 → ~₹95/30min at 12:00) — tightening daily_loss_limit_pct on a decelerating book inside buffer is theatrical. Disciplined HOLD is the correct action.

watch_triggers_next_tick.if_strategy_silence_exceeds_2h_at_12_43_: Composite HIGH meta-trigger becomes 2-of-3 (silence + MAHABANK). Not yet HIGH (book-negative leg still inside buffer) but escalate the monitoring cadence. Flag that the opened admission surface is also ageing without use.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_MAHABANK_pnl_pct_le_-7.00: Consider tightening max_sl_pct 0.04 → 0.03 — pre-specified in 11:30 watch list; still pending.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_MAHABANK_pnl_pct_le_-8.00: FIRE: elevate risk_level to HIGH AND flag strategy_reviewer for same-day intervention. Current buffer 156 bps (widened 20 bps vs 11:30).
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_book_daily_pnl_pct_le_-1.0: FIRE: daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025. Current buffer ₹6,479; drift rate decelerated to ~₹95/30min, so next 30 min expected to stay well inside.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_book_daily_pnl_pct_le_-2.0: FIRE: daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.02 AND risk_level to HIGH.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_HINDUNILVR_pnl_pct_le_-4.0: NEW WATCH: tighten max_sl_pct 0.04 → 0.03 (blends with MAHABANK -7% trigger if both fire).
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_BFSI_pct_of_total_ge_37.0_via_admissi: FIRE: min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65. Current buffer 1.06 pp; would require a BFSI add to move materially.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_new_BUY_through_opened_admission_surf: Verify: (i) min_confidence ≥ 0.60, (ii) position size ≤ 15%, (iii) SL band within [1.0%, 4.0%], (iv) no 4th BFSI unless sub-36% post-admission, (v) no Power re-add (cluster just resolved). Apply fire (d) pre-emptively if the BUY is BFSI to prevent re-stacking.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_strategy_executes_MAHABANK_SELL: Risk_level candidate for LOW step-down. Would resolve the -6% breach and the single-name drag; book likely flips positive on the realized reduction.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_strategy_executes_AUBANK_TRIM_below_1: Risk_level candidate for LOW step-down. Resolves the longest-standing structural grandfathered breach.

housekeeping.risk_config_state: Unchanged — no override added, removed, or modified this tick. Changelog untouched.
housekeeping.next_scheduled_tick: 12:30 IST — watch: (i) strategy silence crossing 2h at 12:43, (ii) MAHABANK trajectory (20 bps recovery this tick — does it continue or reverse?), (iii) HINDUNILVR widening past -3%, (iv) any admission through the opened surface, (v) book daily_pnl_pct drift rate (currently decelerated).
